challenges.claim_tested: Knoll has a positive first read as an office stamp contacting one receipt.
challenges.evidence_checked: Native 96x96 image, full master, and exact-96 derivative lineage.
challenges.rationale: Pear handle, tiered broad base, visible paper contact, and one continuous pale curling receipt remain separable; downward stamping reads before writing or generic handling.

challenges.claim_tested: Knoll avoids forbidden hammer, anvil, table, block, staff, and cane reads.
challenges.evidence_checked: Native 96x96 silhouette and full-resolution hand/prop anatomy.
challenges.rationale: The compact handle has no shaft or striking head, the base rests directly on flexible paper, and no hard work surface or separate block exists.

challenges.claim_tested: Knoll's exact-96 asset is an unchanged same-master derivative.
challenges.evidence_checked: Master SHA-256, derivative SHA-256, declared source hash, dimensions, and independent in-memory LANCZOS reconstruction.
challenges.rationale: The source hash matches the master, dimensions are exactly 96x96, and regenerated pixels match the frozen derivative exactly.

challenges.claim_tested: P006 uses the approved matte Vellum authority without shiny BiRefNet substitution.
challenges.evidence_checked: Approved raw and display-cutout files, SHA-256 values, and frozen Vellum-first comparison.
challenges.rationale: Raw hash 824b55085428af5ef7e0e760edc76400b333c90d8d71c7703aa97848e6752c18 and cutout hash 6f10ecb18330ec3574a4c5950d8cf89a34fcda466f617d9387de2630607b96a0 match; P006 shows the hard-matte cutout.

challenges.claim_tested: The frozen cut shows no concrete visible regression among the eleven unchanged units.
challenges.evidence_checked: Independent reports plus frozen master, face, exact-96, convergence, and Vellum boards.
challenges.rationale: No report identifies a regression, failed professional dimension, anatomy failure, or newly ambiguous exact-96 read.

response_to_peer_evidence.phase2_round6_character_art: Decisive Knoll, lineage, Vellum, and no-regression claims withstand direct evidence checks.
response_to_peer_evidence.phase2_round6_red_team: Adversarial checks of alternate prop reads, anatomy coherence, matte authority, and roster integrity withstand reinspection.

knoll_final_status.rationale: The native exact-96 stamp action is positive, mechanically coherent, lineage-valid, and free of forbidden alternate reads.
